name: Slack
description: Exports your Slack profile, conversations (channels + DMs), and messages from your currently-active Slack workspace.

scopes.label: Your Slack profile
scopes.description: Your Slack user identity and the active workspace metadata (team id, name, domain, display name, plan).

scopes.label: Your Slack conversations
scopes.description: Index of channels, DMs, and group DMs in the active workspace (id, name, type, topic, purpose, members). No message bodies.

scopes.label: Your Slack messages
scopes.description: Message bodies for each conversation in the active workspace, including thread replies. Limited by an optional history window.
